# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Transform: AWSTemplatePSD2Velocity   // If you want Velocity template which can generate different cloudformation yaml for other languages. This is not required as we are providing only code here in detail above, but it's a good idea when developing your templates if using AWS CloudFormation with multiple programming langauges like Python and JavaScript
